title: MDC Benefits from Solid Housing Demand, Industry Woes Persist

title: PulteGroup, Inc. (PHM) Is a Trending Stock: Facts to Know Before Betting on It

title: Home builder stocks suffer unanimous selloff after disappointing new home sales data
text: The home builder sector was suffering a unanimous selloff in morning trading Tuesday, after data showing new home sales surprisingly fell in April, and sharply, amid high prices, rising mortgage rates and low supply. The iShares U.S. Home Construction ETF ITB, -3.76% sank 3.4%, with all 47 equity components losing ground, while the SPDR S&P Homebuilders ETF XHB, -3.67% dove 3.4% with all 35 components falling, to underperform the S&P 500's SPX, -2.09% 2.1% slide.

title: Decorated U.S. Army Veteran Surprised with a New Mortgage-Free Centex Home in Arizona Through PulteGroup's Built to Honor® Program
text: PHOENIX--(BUSINESS WIRE)--In an emotional surprise reveal event, United States Army Sergeant William McCoy learned that he will be the recipient of a brand-new mortgage-free Centex home, awarded through PulteGroup's Built to Honor® program. title: The Pulte Family Commends Outgoing PulteGroup (NYSE:PHM) Director Richard Dreiling
text: BOCA RATON, Fla., May 9, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Pulte Family would like to commend Richard Dreiling, Lead Independent Director of Lowe's Home Improvement (NYSE:LOW) and Executive Chairman of Dollar Tree (NYSE:DLTR), for his service on the independent Board of Directors for PulteGroup, Inc. (NYSE:PHM) where he served as chair of nominating and governance for a period of time.

title: PulteGroup's Built to Honor® Program Celebrates Military Appreciation Month with Milestone 75th Mortgage-Free Home for Injured U.S. Army Veteran in Dallas
text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)--After nearly a decade of giving back to our nation's military heroes, national homebuilder PulteGroup's Built to Honor® program is proud to announce the construction of its milestone 75th mortgage-free home. title: PulteGroup: Buy. Housing Is In A Bullish Shortage, Not A Bearish Bubble
text: The sharp rise in home prices and new home sales over the past two years is due to a record housing shortage. There is little evidence that the housing boom was due to debt-driven excess demand.
